begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount
, (select pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid where sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = 'TRB' ) as bank_acc_no
, coalesce((select sum(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid where sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = 'TRB' ),0) as trb_amount
, coalesce((select sum(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid where sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ('CHQ') ),0) as chq_amount
, coalesce((select sum(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid where sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money not in ('CHQ','TRB') ),0) as other_amount
FROM sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '01/02/2024' ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
